title: Array Min/Max
description: Find the smallest and largest elements in an integer array.
problemStatement:
Arrays store multiple values of the same type. Given an array `int arr[] = {12, 5, 87, 1, 45}`, find both the minimum and maximum values.

**Expected Output:** `Min: 1, Max: 87`.
hints: Initialize `min` and `max` variables with the first element of the array.
Loop through the rest of the array and update `min`/`max` if you find a smaller/larger value.
